children.name: Madog ap Iowerth Argylwydd ap Yr Hendwr

zh.lifeSummary: Iowerth Argylwydd Ap Yr Hendower於大約1250年出生在威爾士。他至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Iowerth Argylwydd Ap Yr Hendower于大约1250年出生在威尔士。他至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Yr
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Korean (Yŏ): there are two Chinese characters for this surname. Only one of them is used by a clan large enough to warrant treatment here. The Ŭryŏng Yŏ clan's founding ancestor is said to have been Yŏ Sŏn-jae, a Song Chinese government officer who migrated from China to Koryŏ. Although members of the Yŏn clan can be found throughout the Korean peninsula, they are concentrated in the Kyŏngsang provinces. Compare Yeo and Yoh .
Chinese: Teochew, Hokkien, and Taiwanese form of the surnames 楊, (see   Yang   1) and 姚 (see   Yao   1).
Chinese: variant of   Yue   and   You  .

variants.name: Yeo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Yong, Cheng, In, Li, Youngho, Bock, Byeong, Chi, Eunsook, Fung, Hoon, In Young.

English (Devon): from southwestern Middle English ya, yo, yeo ‘river or stream’ (Old English ēa), either a topographic name denoting residence near a stream or a habitational name from any of several minor places in Devon and Somerset named with this word. The same word is found in Nye , Rye , and Tye .

variants.name: Yoh
meanings: Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 余, see   Yu   1.

nameMeanings.name: Iowerth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from iōr‘ ‘lord’ + a mutated form of berth ‘handsome’; borne in the Mabinogi by the jealous brother of Madawg , son of Maredudd . Iorwerth came to be regarded as a Welsh equivalent of Edward , but it has no actual connection with that name.

variants.name: Yorath
meanings: Anglicized form of   Iorwerth   or, in some cases, a transferred use of the surname derived from it.

en.lifeSummary: Iowerth Argylwydd Ap Yr Hendower was born about 1250, in Wales. He had at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Iowerth Argylwydd Ap Yr Hendower est né environ 1250, à Galles. Il a eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Iowerth Argylwydd Ap Yr Hendower wurde um 1250 in Wales geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Iowerth Argylwydd Ap Yr Hendower è nato il circa 1250 nel Galles. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Iowerth Argylwydd Ap Yr Hendowerは約1250年にウェールズで生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Iowerth Argylwydd Ap Yr Hendower(은)는 대략 1250년 웨일스에서 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Iowerth Argylwydd Ap Yr Hendower nasceu aproximadamente 1250, em Gales. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Iowerth Argylwydd Ap Yr Hendower родился около 1250 г. в местности Уэльс. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Iowerth Argylwydd Ap Yr Hendower nació aproximadamente 1250, en Gales. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo.
